annuli_tab.unconfigured_hint: Annuli integration **is not wired up** — falling back to local ~/.mori/memory/. Once an annuli HTTP service is connected, Mori reads / writes SOUL / MEMORY / events / rings through the vault.
annuli_tab.events_empty: (no events yet today, or chat is not wired to annuli)

profiles_tab.title: Profiles
profiles_tab.hint: Click "Switch" to apply immediately; click "Edit" to open the .md editor — next hotkey press reads the new content (no restart). Profile body can use #file: to include other files.
profiles_tab.new_voice_prompt: New voice profile filename (e.g. USER-07.work-notes), without .md
profiles_tab.new_agent_prompt: New agent profile filename (e.g. AGENT-04.my-assistant), without .md
profiles_tab.invalid_name: Filename only accepts letters / digits / CJK / . _ - space + parens

skills_tab.title: Skills
skills_tab.hint: Skills enabled by the current active agent profile. Built-in (translate / polish / memory / action skills, etc.) + shell_skill (custom CLI wrappers defined in profile frontmatter). After editing a profile, click Refresh.

deps_tab.title: Deps
deps_tab.hint: Optional tools / models. Installing one unlocks the corresponding feature. Ones needing sudo (system packages) show the command for you to run in a terminal yourself; others (pip / wget / curl install.sh) can be auto-installed by Mori.
deps_tab.manual_label: Run this in a terminal (needs sudo)
deps_tab.recheck_after_manual: After installing, click here to recheck
deps_tab.comment_auto_extract: # Mori will auto download + extract to

memory_tab.empty_hint: Ask Mori to "remember…" during chat — it'll auto-write. Or click "+ New memory" above to add manually.
memory_tab.hint: Browse / edit long-term memory at ~/.mori/memory/. Mori maintains them via remember / recall_memory / forget_memory / edit_memory skills; you can also edit directly. Changes apply immediately (next hotkey press reads new content).
memory_tab.body_placeholder: Memory content — markdown supported. Prefer concise bullets / key points over long prose.

chat_panel.clear_title: Clear current chat history (long-term memory unchanged)
chat_panel.greeting_hint: Talk to Mori — press Ctrl+Alt+Space to start recording, or type below.
chat_panel.type_placeholder: Type a message or paste text / Ctrl+Enter to send
chat_panel.sleeping_rec_title: Mori is sleeping — click the sun button above to wake
chat_panel.session_path_linux_other: linux (tty / unset) · global hotkey unavailable, UI buttons still work
chat_panel.session_path_title: OS session Mori detected — decides which global hotkey path is used

config_tab.title: Config
config_tab.savebar_hint: ~/.mori/config.json · changes apply next hotkey press, no restart needed

appearance.locale_hint: Switch UI display language. Proper nouns (SOUL.md / MEMORY.md / API key names) always stay in original form.
